citation.description: build job (lines 57-136) creates SHA256SUMS, uploads dist/ bundle + evidence-artifacts; publish job (lines 200-233) downloads the same bundle, runs `sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS`, no python -m build present

criteria.criterion: The release builds artifacts once and uploads a single named bundle containing the wheel, the sdist, and a SHA256SUMS file; publish downloads that bundle, runs sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS, and does not rebuild.

citation.description: wheel_test job (lines 138-167) and sdist_test job (lines 168-198) with all named probes and non-null COMMIT asserts

criteria.criterion: A wheel-test job installs the exact wheel by filename with no source checkout and runs concrete probes; an sdist-test job installs from the sdist with REBAR_BUILD_COMMIT unset and asserts non-null COMMIT.

citation.description: test_hook_fails_when_rebar_build_commit_empty (line 408) and test_hook_falls_back_to_git_when_env_unset (line 431) exist; hatch_build.py implements four-step precedence with set-but-empty fail-fast

criteria.criterion: Workflow sets REBAR_BUILD_COMMIT=${GITHUB_SHA::7}; test_attestation_signing.py adds test_hook_fails_when_rebar_build_commit_empty and test_hook_falls_back_to_git_when_env_unset; four-step hook precedence; fail-fast only on set-but-empty env.

citation.description: check (f) at line 132 asserts evidence-artifacts is present; release.yml lines 123-136 upload the evidence-artifacts fragment

criteria.criterion: The build-once job uploads an evidence-artifacts fragment (wheel/sdist SHA-256 sums); test_release_workflow_pins.py check (f) asserts evidence-artifacts fragment name and wiring in release.yml.

citation.description: test_g_publish_hash_gated_no_rebuild, test_h_wheel_and_sdist_test_jobs_with_probes, test_i_build_once_bundle_with_sha256sums all present and substantive

criteria.criterion: ACs 1 and 2 made in-session-verifiable: test_release_workflow_pins.py gains checks (g) sha256sum-c-SHA256SUMS + no-rebuild in publish, (h) wheel-test/sdist-test jobs with named probes, (i) build-once bundle with SHA256SUMS + evidence-artifacts.

citation.description: 'Build-once — the tested bytes are the published bytes' section at line 154; '5. Smoke test — PRE-publication, against the exact wheel/sdist' at line 294 replaces the old post-release section

criteria.criterion: docs/releasing.md describes the build-once → test → publish-same-bytes flow, and the Post-release smoke test section is rewritten to reflect pre-publication testing.
